code:
sequenceDiagram participant DEV as Developer participant GIT as Git Repository participant DOCKER as Docker Build participant AR as Artifact Registry participant GKE as GKE Cluster participant K8S as Kubernetes API participant POD as Backend Pod participant OL as Ollama Container participant HPA as HPA Controller Note over DEV,HPA: CI/CD Deployment Pipeline DEV->>+GIT: git push (Logistics_FleetManagement) GIT->>-DEV: Push confirmed DEV->>+DOCKER: ./deploy-gke.sh DOCKER->>DOCKER: Validate Prerequisites DOCKER->>DOCKER: Setup GCloud Auth Note over DOCKER,AR: Image Build Process DOCKER->>+DOCKER: Build Ollama Image Note over DOCKER: FROM ollama/ollama:latest
RUN ollama pull tinyllama DOCKER->>-DOCKER: Ollama Image Ready DOCKER->>+DOCKER: Build Backend Image Note over DOCKER: FROM python:3.11
COPY app/ requirements.txt DOCKER->>-DOCKER: Backend Image Ready DOCKER->>+DOCKER: Build Frontend Image Note over DOCKER: FROM node:18 (Logistics_DeliveryRoute)
FROM nginx:alpine (Logistics_FleetManagement) DOCKER->>-DOCKER: Frontend Image Ready DOCKER->>+AR: Push Images AR->>AR: Store Images with Tags AR->>-DOCKER: Push Complete Note over DOCKER,HPA: Kubernetes Deployment DOCKER->>+K8S: kubectl apply -f k8s/rbac.yaml K8S->>-DOCKER: RBAC Applied DOCKER->>+K8S: kubectl apply -f k8s/configmap-cloud.yaml K8S->>-DOCKER: ConfigMap Applied DOCKER->>+K8S: kubectl apply -f k8s/backend-deployment-cloud.yaml K8S->>K8S: Schedule Backend Pods K8S->>+POD: Create Backend Pod POD->>+AR: Pull Backend Image AR->>-POD: Image Downloaded POD->>+AR: Pull Ollama Image AR->>-POD: Image Downloaded Note over POD,OL: Pod Startup Sequence POD->>+OL: Start Ollama Container OL->>OL: Initialize Ollama Server OL->>OL: Load TinyLlama Model (Logistics_TrackingNumber) OL->>-POD: Ollama Ready (Logistics_Warehouse) POD->>+POD: Start FastAPI Container POD->>POD: Initialize FastAPI App POD->>+OL: Test Connection (Logistics_TrackingNumber) OL->>-POD: Connection Successful POD->>-POD: FastAPI Ready POD->>+K8S: Report Pod Ready K8S->>-POD: Readiness Confirmed K8S->>-DOCKER: Backend Deployment Complete DOCKER->>+K8S: kubectl apply -f k8s/frontend-deployment-cloud.yaml K8S->>K8S: Schedule Frontend Pods K8S->>-DOCKER: Frontend Deployment Complete DOCKER->>+K8S: kubectl apply -f k8s/hpa-cloud.yaml K8S->>+HPA: Create HPA Resources HPA->>HPA: Monitor Backend Metrics HPA->>-K8S: HPA Active K8S->>-DOCKER: HPA Applied DOCKER->>+K8S: kubectl get services K8S->>-DOCKER: External IP Available DOCKER->>-DEV: Deployment Complete
App URL: http://EXTERNAL-IP Note over DEV,HPA: Health Verification DEV->>+GKE: curl http://EXTERNAL-IP/health GKE->>+POD: Route Health Check POD->>+OL: Verify Ollama Status OL->>-POD: Status OK POD->>-GKE: Health Check Passed GKE->>-DEV: 200 OK Note over DEV,HPA: Auto-scaling Verification HPA->>+POD: Monitor CPU/Memory POD->>-HPA: Metrics: CPU 30%, Memory 40% HPA->>HPA: Within Thresholds (Logistics_DeliveryRoute) Note over DEV,HPA: Rolling Update Process DEV->>+DOCKER: Deploy New Version DOCKER->>+AR: Push Updated Images AR->>-DOCKER: Images Updated DOCKER->>+K8S: kubectl apply (Logistics_TrackingNumber) K8S->>K8S: Rolling Update Strategy K8S->>+POD: Create New Pod POD->>POD: Start New Version POD->>-K8S: New Pod Ready K8S->>K8S: Terminate Old Pod K8S->>-DOCKER: Rolling Update Complete DOCKER->>-DEV: Update Successful

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为物流车队管理系统设计一个完整的CI/CD部署流程图，涵盖从代码提交到GKE集群自动扩缩容的全链路。关键是要有FleetManagement、DeliveryRoute、TrackingNumber和Warehouse这几个物流模块的部署标记。
明白。这个流程需要包含Ollama容器吗？我看到您提到了TrackingNumber和Warehouse，这两个模块是跟AI推理相关还是纯业务逻辑？
对，需要Ollama容器。TrackingNumber模块会调用TinyLlama模型做智能单号识别，Warehouse模块是Ollama就绪后的状态标记。整个后端Pod里要同时跑FastAPI和Ollama两个容器。
好的，那我先画出主干流程：Developer推送FleetManagement代码到Git Repository，触发Docker Build，然后镜像推送到Artifact Registry，最后通过Kubernetes API部署到GKE Cluster。这样结构清晰吗？
结构可以，但Docker Build阶段要细化。我们需要三个镜像：Ollama镜像基于ollama/ollama:latest并预拉tinyllama，后端镜像用python:3.11，前端镜像要区分一下——DeliveryRoute模块用node:18构建，FleetManagement模块最终用nginx:alpine托管。
已添加镜像构建细节。现在Docker Build节点里有三个并行构建流程，都指向Artifact Registry。接下来我画Kubernetes部署部分：先应用RBAC和ConfigMap，再部署Backend Pod，这个Pod要从Artifact Registry拉取Backend和Ollama两个镜像。
Backend Pod的启动顺序很重要，要体现出来：先启动Ollama Container，等TinyLlama模型加载完成（标记为Warehouse就绪），然后FastAPI Container才能启动，并且要主动测试Ollama连接成功后才报告Pod Ready。
明白了，我加了Pod Startup Sequence的注释，显示Ollama先初始化、加载模型，然后FastAPI启动并做连接测试。现在继续补全：Frontend Deployment和HPA Controller，HPA要监控Backend的CPU和内存指标。
HPA的状态标记用DeliveryRoute，表示自动扩缩容策略生效。另外最后要加一个健康验证流程：Developer通过GKE的External IP访问，经过路由到Backend Pod，Pod再验证Ollama状态，返回200 OK。
健康验证流程已加。我注意到HPA监控时POD返回的指标是CPU 30%、Memory 40%，并且标记为Within Thresholds (Logistics_DeliveryRoute)，这样对吗？
对的。最后还需要一个Rolling Update流程：Developer触发新版本部署，Docker Build推送更新后的镜像到Artifact Registry，Kubernetes执行滚动更新，先创建新Pod、就绪后再终止旧Pod。这个更新触发点用TrackingNumber标记。
Rolling Update流程已补充完整。整个图现在从Developer的git push开始，经过镜像构建、推送、K8s部署、HPA扩缩容、健康检查，到最后滚动更新，形成了完整的CI/CD闭环。您看一下整体结构？
有个细节需要修正：在Docker Build阶段，deploy-gke.sh脚本执行前应该有个Validate Prerequisites和Setup GCloud Auth的自检步骤，这个不能省略，否则镜像推送会失败。
已修复，在Developer调用./deploy-gke.sh之后，Docker Build节点内增加了Validate Prerequisites和Setup GCloud Auth两个自检步骤，然后才进入镜像构建流程。还有其他需要调整的吗？
确认一下各个物流标记的分布：FleetManagement在git push和nginx前端两处，DeliveryRoute在node前端构建和HPA阈值判断两处，TrackingNumber在Ollama连接测试和滚动更新触发两处，Warehouse在Ollama就绪状态一处。这样分布合理吗？

核对无误，四个物流模块的标记都已正确嵌入到对应的技术环节。整个sequenceDiagram涵盖了CI/CD Deployment Pipeline、Image Build Process、Pod Startup Sequence、Kubernetes Deployment、Health Verification、Auto-scaling Verification和Rolling Update Process七个关键阶段。
完美，这个图可以定稿了。完整呈现了从Developer代码提交到GKE集群自动化运维的全流程，特别是Backend Pod内Ollama和FastAPI的协同启动机制，以及HPA和Rolling Update的运维保障能力。
